text: Computer vision is a field of artificial intelligence that enables computers to interpret and understand visual information from the world. Image recognition allows computers to identify objects, people, or scenes in photos and videos. Object detection goes further by not only recognizing what is in an image but also locating where it is. These technologies have many practical applications. For example, self-driving cars use computer vision to detect road signs, pedestrians, and other vehicles, helping them navigate safely. Other applications include facial recognition for security and medical image analysis. As technology advances, computer vision continues to improve how machines interact with the world.
